title: wahlenbergia albomarginata subsp. albomarginata
intro: Wahlenbergia albomarginata subsp. albomarginata is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae, commonly known as a white-tinged bluebell. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Wahlenbergia albomarginata subsp. albomarginata include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. It is used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
